nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Blue-crowned chlorophonia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in several populations of various sizes from Veracruz in southeastern Mexico south through Guatemala, northern El Salvador, and much of Honduras into north-central Nicaragua. In the breeding season it inhabits montane evergreen forest including cloudforest and pine–oak forest
